title: EstroCraft
description: A Modpack that you can make an Estrogen Factory on the MOON!! hehe <3
body:
![EstroCraft Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d09aa3c437ac28acc44a8bfc03b64b47a7aec133.png)

## Modpack made by Fem for Fems :3

In this pack, explore the **solar system** and find a new place to stay with [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra), jam out with some singing frogs or make some mobs play some music for you with [Immersive Melodies](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-melodies), or make your own laboratory (**Estrogen hehe**) with the [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) mod. the possibilities are **endless!**


## Sneak Peek of Mods:
![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da2ae9d581320c72c1e14f6cbf45c03462bac160.png)
- **Better Nether**: Explore a Nether thats been Revamped to a whole new level
- **Macaws Essentials (multiple mods)**: Just because there is not enough Furniture
- **Better End**: Wow the end doesn't look too "spacial" anymore.
- **Hephaestus**: Originally Tinker's Construct
- **Fabric Seasons**: Cuz one Season isn't Enough.
- **Sophisticated Backpacks**: Backpacks that actually are Useful
- **Immersive Paintings**: Add your own images into Minecraft.
- **Immersive Aircraft**: Get around your world faster in style.
- **CC: Tweaked**: Build a Computer in minecraft
- **The Aether**: Go to Heaven's Paradise... where things are not always as it seems.
- and more!

![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da2ae9d581320c72c1e14f6cbf45c03462bac160.png)



Pic of an Estrogen factory on the Moon vvvvv
